Class LegoDAO

java.lang.Object
LegoDAO
public class LegoDAO extends Object
The LegoDAO class acts as the Data Access Object for interacting with the lego_sets table in the SQLite database Provides methods to crate, read, update and delete (CRUD) legoset records.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description

    Method
    Description
    static void

    Inserts a new Lego set in the database.
    static void

    Deletes lego set from the database by ID.

    Checks if a Lego set with the given ID already exists in the database
    static List<LegoSet>
    getAllSets(Connection conn)
    Retrieces Lego Sets from the database.
    static void

  • Method Details

    • exists

      public static boolean exists(Connection conn, String legoSetID)
      Checks if a Lego set with the given ID already exists in the database
      Parameters:
      conn - active database connection
      legoSetID - the ID of the lego set to check
      Returns:
      true if the set exists, false otherwise.

    • addSet

      public static void addSet(Connection conn, LegoSet set)
      Inserts a new Lego set in the database.
      Parameters:
      conn - active database connection
      set - the LegoSet object to insert

    • deleteSet

      public static void deleteSet(Connection conn, String id)
      Deletes lego set from the database by ID.
      Parameters:
      conn - active database connection
      id - the ID of the Lego set to delete

    • updateSet

      public static void updateSet(Connection conn, LegoSet set)
      Updates an existing Lego set in the database.
      Parameters:
      conn - the active database connection
      set - the LegoSet object containing updated values

    • getAllSets

      public static List<LegoSet> getAllSets(Connection conn)
      Retrieces Lego Sets from the database.
      Parameters:
      conn - active database connection
      Returns:
      list of all LegoSet objects stored in the database.
